assembly_metadata.label: LIVE PILOT DRAFT - HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE

selected_headline: Lead Product Manager - Monetization, Loyalty & Wallet Growth
summary: Lead Product Manager focused on monetization, loyalty, and wallet-adjacent growth, with verified evidence across referral incentives, AI/ML personalization, platform execution, and payments trust. Proof points include Rs. 1M+ ARR in nine months, 20% MRR growth, 25% engagement lift, a 10x revenue scale-up, and referral contribution growth from 1.5% to 3%. Product OS provides the public proof layer; LoyaltyIQ remains a clearly labeled portfolio simulation, not production experience.

bullets.text: Generated Rs. 1M+ ARR in nine months through pricing, packaging, and personalized upsell strategy for zero-to-one platform products.
Converted AI/ML-powered personalization into product discovery improvements, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth while building AI roadmap readiness.
Built organic acquisition and retention loops that doubled organic traffic and lifted revenue by 10%.
Improved platform throughput by 15% and release speed 2x through architecture and DevOps maturity work.
Scaled beta-stage Biopharma monetization into a portfolio motion, increasing revenue by 30% through customer-driven pricing and packaging.
Partnered with engineering and data science to evaluate ML personalization models, converting behavioral insights into product requirements.
Increased session duration 40%, page views 15%, and video consumption 12%, strengthening workflow adoption signals.
Built referral incentive mechanics that doubled organic revenue contribution from 1.5% to 3%, creating direct loyalty and rewards evidence.
Scaled Job Guarantee revenue 10x, from Rs. 1M to Rs. 10M, through monetization, packaging, and go-to-market alignment.
Improved traffic-to-lead conversion by 62% and lead-to-customer conversion by 40% through structured experimentation and journey optimization.
Prioritized reliability and trust across mobile money workflows supporting 10M+ monthly transactions.
Improved payment product engagement to 83% and CSAT to 94% through targeting, segmentation, and multichannel integration.

selected_projects.name: LoyaltyIQ - AI-Personalized Loyalty and Wallet Engine
selected_projects.label: Portfolio simulation
selected_projects.note: Not eBay-sponsored; not production; no real customer data claimed.

education: MBA, Indian Institute of Management Indore
B.Tech Computer Engineering, National Institute of Technology Surat
awards: Selected awards available in canonical data

warnings: Do not imply direct eBay, marketplace, or wallet production ownership.
LoyaltyIQ must be labeled as portfolio simulation.
Do not inflate 9+ years to the JD's 10+ year requirement.

gaps.gap: Direct eBay-scale marketplace loyalty production ownership is not fully proven
gaps.mitigation: Use verified referral/rewards, monetization, wallet-adjacent payments, and LoyaltyIQ simulation with clear labeling.

gaps.gap: Direct digital wallet product ownership is adjacent rather than exact
gaps.mitigation: Use Mahindra Comviva payments reliability and platform trust evidence; avoid claiming wallet ownership as production experience.

gaps.gap: 10+ years TPM requirement is close but may need recruiter interpretation
gaps.mitigation: Use 9+ years plus technical product depth; do not inflate years.
